# Eoyc

> Endless Options, Your Chain - A powerful CLI tool for encoding and hashing strings with flexible chain operations

## Pages

- [Eoyc](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/)
- [Background](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/background/)

## Encoders Reference

- [Base64 Encoders](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/encoders/base64/)
- [Binary & Character Encoders](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/encoders/binary/)
- [Hash & Digest Encoders](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/encoders/digests/)
- [Hex Encoders](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/encoders/hex/)
- [Text Transformations](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/encoders/text/)
- [URL Encoders](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/encoders/url/)

## Get Started

- [Examples](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/get_started/examples/)
- [Installation](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/get_started/installation/)
- [Usage](https://eoyc.hahwul.com/get_started/usage/)
